organization.organization_background: Utkrusht is a proof-of-skills marketplace that helps agile teams find talent with strong fundamental concepts with within days. We help aspiring professionals improve their profile with continuous improvement in their skills, documenting their journey and helping them fulfill their potential. We primarily build, conduct, proctor and disseminate proof-of-skill assessments in Technical domains like AI, ML, Fullstack development, High scale distributed systems, DevOps etc but do help non-tech roles like Sales, HR, Marketing etc

role_context: At the BASIC level, a developer with 1-2 years of experience in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript is expected to build and maintain page-level UI features such as semantic page structures, responsive layouts, forms, reusable styled components, and simple interactive behaviors like input validation, show/hide states, and dynamic content updates. They should be able to work independently on well-defined tasks using Flexbox, Grid, media queries, CSS frameworks or SASS-based styles, while following established conventions for accessibility, naming, cross-browser support, and maintainable code in an existing frontend codebase. Their day-to-day work includes debugging with browser developer tools, fixing layout and styling issues, updating DOM behavior with basic event handling and asynchronous calls, and making practical improvements to performance, SEO-friendly markup, and code organization. They are expected to apply sound judgment within known patterns and project standards, but typically rely on senior developers for architecture decisions, complex state or async flows, and breaking down larger frontend problems.
questions_prompt:
# Task: Frontend Popup — Design Replication

## Task Overview
Replicate a provided popup design using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript/jQuery. The popup should appear automatically after 5 seconds of page load, close when the user clicks the close icon in the top-right corner, and redirect to an external site in a new tab when the call-to-action button is clicked.

## Business Context
Nerdium's design team needs a reusable promotional popup component that matches a provided visual specification exactly. The popup is intended to be embedded on a web page and serve as a marketing/sign-up prompt.

## Functional Requirements
1. The popup **displays automatically after 5 seconds** of page load.
2. A **close icon in the top-right corner** dismisses/hides the popup when clicked.
3. Clicking the **"Sign Up Now" button** opens `https://designerds.com.au` in a **new browser tab**.
4. The popup must **visually replicate the provided design** as closely as possible (see Design Reference below).
5. Implementation must use **HTML + CSS** for structure and styling, and **JavaScript or jQuery** for all interactive logic (timing, close behaviour, redirect).

## Design Reference
![Design Reference](https://drive.google.com/thumbnail?id=1jWlsgFfZgfBjekbGlLq5hwyxRQ0HXsD0&sz=w1200)

Full-resolution: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jWlsgFfZgfBjekbGlLq5hwyxRQ0HXsD0/view

## Starter Code

**Note:** Your document contains a link to a bot-protected external resource. We do not circumvent these protections (jurisdictional restrictions). What to do instead: open the link, copy the source file-by-file into this document, and re-run the parser.

## Evaluation Criteria
- **Attention to detail (HTML + CSS)** — How closely the implementation replicates the provided design (layout, typography, colours, spacing, imagery)
- **JavaScript/jQuery fluency** — Correct and clean implementation of popup timing (5-second delay), close behaviour, and new-tab redirect
- **Code quality** — Readable, well-structured, and maintainable code
- **Cross-browser behaviour** — Popup functions correctly in modern browsers
